data.body:
## Description

Create `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh` validating the brainstorm approval gate structure.

**Files to create/edit**: (1) `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh` (create), (2) `.test-index` (edit — append with RED marker)

Section-scoped tests:
- SKILL.md contains approval gate section with 4 options (approve, red/blue team, additional research, discuss)
- Options correctly labeled as initial-run vs re-run based on prior execution state
- Planning-intelligence log entry structure documented (triggers, scenario count, practitioner cycles)

**TDD Requirement**: This IS the RED test. Fails because approval gate hasn't been modified yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] Test passes bash -n
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED)
  Verify: ! bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry updated with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'brainstorm/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-brainstorm-approval-gate'
